blocking_gaps.required_for_c_axis: Hamiltonian depends on out-of-plane momentum or a physically equivalent c-axis coordinate.
Pairing tensor can be evaluated on c-axis-injected states.
BdG Hamiltonian supports the same out-of-plane momentum structure.
Public model methods accept a c-axis coordinate or true 3D momentum.
Fermi-surface extraction supports a 3D surface or c-axis injection manifold.

blocking_gaps.current_evidence: returns (cos(angle), sin(angle)) in the kx-ky plane
blocking_gaps.required_for_c_axis: Interface normal can represent out-of-plane injection, e.g. a 3-vector along z.

blocking_gaps.current_evidence: finite differences only in kx and ky; returns a 2-component velocity
blocking_gaps.required_for_c_axis: Velocity matching includes an out-of-plane velocity component.

capability_matrix.required_for_c_axis: Hamiltonian depends on out-of-plane momentum or a physically equivalent c-axis coordinate.
Pairing tensor can be evaluated on c-axis-injected states.
BdG Hamiltonian supports the same out-of-plane momentum structure.
Public model methods accept a c-axis coordinate or true 3D momentum.
Fermi-surface extraction supports a 3D surface or c-axis injection manifold.

capability_matrix.current_evidence: returns (cos(angle), sin(angle)) in the kx-ky plane
capability_matrix.required_for_c_axis: Interface normal can represent out-of-plane injection, e.g. a 3-vector along z.

capability_matrix.current_evidence: finite differences only in kx and ky; returns a 2-component velocity
capability_matrix.required_for_c_axis: Velocity matching includes an out-of-plane velocity component.

capability_matrix.current_evidence: canonical modes are limited to inplane_100 and inplane_110
capability_matrix.required_for_c_axis: Public direction registry exposes c-axis only after a validated c-axis path exists.

final_verdict: The current forward truth chain cannot represent true c-axis transport. c-axis is formally unsupported and must not be emulated by any raw 2D in-plane interface_angle.

public_interface_policy.raw_interface_angle: must not be labeled as c-axis

required_extension_plan: Define a microscopic or phenomenological out-of-plane momentum coordinate, e.g. kz or an equivalent c-axis injection manifold.
Extend the normal-state Hamiltonian and pairing matrix so they can be evaluated on that coordinate.
Extract or sample the correct c-axis transport states rather than reusing the 2D kx-ky Fermi contours.
Define c-axis interface normal, velocity projection, and specular/reflected-state construction with an out-of-plane velocity component.
Validate the c-axis path against dedicated reflection diagnostics and spectra before exposing it as a public mode.
